generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearbox for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current I_M to derive torque via known motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular position data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current I_M data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor torque derived from current sensor using motor constant"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor acceleration derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionModelOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models for static, kinetic, and viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for mechanical structure of MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for mechanical structure of MABI MAX 100 robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot axis metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for friction dynamics (static, kinetic, viscous)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) derived from model-data deviation analysis"
]

instance FrictionDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized friction models and data for motion accuracy analysis"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction models and data in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDataVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML for robot axis components"
]

instance AASManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset metadata management service using Asset Administration Shell"
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data streaming service via MQTT protocol"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Robot motion control service using SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for multi-physics simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASManagementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAlgorithmService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control algorithm adjustments for improved motion accuracy in SINUMERIK 840D sl controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstVerticalAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First vertical robot axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for motion control accuracy"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIKController
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving input current I_M for robot axis motion"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in transmission for torque conversion"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox converting motor torque to output torque τ_out"
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live data streaming via MQTT, enabling continuous identification of friction models during robot operation without latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot axis components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streaming via MQTT, Simulink-based processing components for friction model computation, AAS for contextual asset metadata, and dashboard visualization to create a unified digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on continuous monitoring and analysis of joint friction during active robot operation over time, accounting for wear and varying operational conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed through deviation analysis between simulated data (from white-box/black-box friction models) and measured reference data, with validation of friction models against real-world operational conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow, enabling low-latency data transfer for continuous model updating."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as part of Industrie 4.0 standards, SysML for systems engineering modeling, and adherence to Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies."
]
